name: Bus Station Saigon Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 4 oz cold pork tenderloin; sliced thinly
1 jalapeno pepper or Thai chili; chopped
recipeInstructions:
This recipe comes from "Uncle Billy's Downeast BBQ Book" (ISBN 0-9622518-0-1).
Using pulled pork instead of the tenderloin yields great results. Slice the roll open, leaving the ends intact to create a pocket. Place the pate, pork, and shallots inside. Add the remaining vegetables on top. To make the sauce, mix together the garlic sauce, lime juice, sugar, and nuoc mam until the sugar is dissolved. This sauce serves 3-4 sandwiches. Adjust the amount of chili according to your preference.
